title: Pet Food * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Pet Food * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Foster Families Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Women Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT ESTHER'S PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry, pet food, and personal care items that are available once a month. People without an HIV diagnosis may be eligible to receive a one-time food box of pantry staple items. Accepts donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, toilet paper, and personal care items. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT ESTHER'S PANTRY
